title: CodeGrind: AI Assistant Meets City Backdrop Upgrade
summary: Show how CodeGrind's AI assistant aids problem-solving alongside the refreshed city backdrop and city map components—illustrating a more immersive learning loop.
core_message: CodeGrind now pairs Azure OpenAI-powered problem-solving guidance with the updated cyberpunk city backdrop, enhanced city map and improved scene management to create a more engaging DSA practice experience.
cta: Try a guided problem session with the AI assistant and explore the new City backdrop and Map features in CodeGrind.
visual_brief: A short, cinematic demo: split-screen or overlay showing the AI assistant responding to a coding prompt on the left and the cyberpunk city backdrop with the CityMap in motion on the right. Include subtle UI elements: code editor, problem description, AI chat, and a circling highlight around a skyline or tower visualizing problem-solving steps. End with a CTA screen: ‘Practice with AI • Explore City Backdrop’.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
